executives.name: Chirantan "CJ" Desai
executives.background: Chirantan "CJ" Desai has served as our President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Chief Product and Engineering Officer from 2016 to 2023.

executives.name: Harry You
executives.background: Mr. You has served as a director since 2019. He is the co-founder and Vice Chairman of dMY Technology Group. He previously served as CFO of EMC Corporation and EVP at Oracle Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President (Office of the Chairman)

executives.name: Jeremy Burton
executives.background: CEO of Observe, Inc. Former CMO of Dell Technologies and Executive Director at EMC.

tenure_dates.title: President, Products and Marketing / Executive Vice President

executives.name: Patrick Gelsinger
executives.background: Patrick P. Gelsinger has been a director and Intel’s CEO since February 2021. He has over 40 years of technology and leadership experience, including 30 years at Intel in various engineering and leadership roles. Prior to returning to Intel, he served as CEO of VMware, Inc. from 2012 to 2021 and as President and COO of EMC Corp.’s Information Infrastructure Products business from 2009 to 2012.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer, Information Infrastructure Products

board_of_directors.name: Harry You
board_of_directors.background: Mr. You has served as a director since 2019. He is the co-founder and Vice Chairman of dMY Technology Group. He previously served as CFO of EMC Corporation and EVP at Oracle Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President (Office of the Chairman)
